suite.name: Main Suite

kw.name: Initialize Suite
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Initialize Logger
kw.doc: Initialize a dedicated logger with file + console output.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.
Initialize logger, load configurations, and start the automation suite.

test.name: Run Multiple Environments

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Setup Excel
kw.doc: Create Excel if not exists and ensure required sheets.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Open Login
kw.msg: 🌐 Opening URL: file:///C:/Users/vishakhajad/Desktop/ArgoTrak_Project/Agrotrak_Python_Robot_Project/templates/dummy_templates.html ℹ️ No login form found (dummy page). Skipping login.
kw.doc: Opens the given URL in a browser and performs login. Uses the SAME SeleniumLibrary instance that Robot Framework is using.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ✅ Browser opened and login (if any) attempted
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Call Multiple UI Functions
Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Perform Device List Actions
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Extract And Save Device Table
Extract Device Table
kw.doc: Return all rows of the device table as a list of lists of strings. Each inner list corresponds to one table row.

kw.name: Create List
kw.msg: ${row} = ['Charter Boats', 'Copied Alert Demo', '10 min', '5 nmi', 'Sun,Mon,Wed,Sat', '11:00:00 AM', '20:00:00 PM', 'alerts@argotrak.com']
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create List
kw.msg: ${rows} = [['Charter Boats', 'Copied Alert Demo', '10 min', '5 nmi', 'Sun,Mon,Wed,Sat', '11:00:00 AM', '20:00:00 PM', 'alerts@argotrak.com']]
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Open Maintenance Manager

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword Unless
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED since RF 5.0. Use Native IF/ELSE or `Run Keyword If` instead.*

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.arg: ⚠️ Maintenance table not visible or empty

kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

Element Should Be Visible

kw.name: Extract Checked Tree Labels
kw.msg: ${checked_labels} = Charter Boats, Double Sunshine, Rental Boats

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create List
kw.msg: ${row_data} = ['Harry Johnson', 'harry_j', 'charterboat_123', 'charter boats', 'Charter Boats, Double Sunshine, Rental Boats']
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create List
kw.msg: ${rows_to_add} = [['Harry Johnson', 'harry_j', 'charterboat_123', 'charter boats', 'Charter Boats, Double Sunshine, Rental Boats']]
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Append Rows To Sheet
kw.doc: Append multiple rows to an Excel sheet.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ✅ Credentials data written to Excel 'Credentials' sheet (checked only)
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Extract user credentials + checked permissions and write to Excel safely

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Log Error
kw.arg: ❌ Exception occurred during Call Multiple UI Functions: ${error}
kw.doc: Log error message.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: 🔥 Exception captured during Call Multiple UI Functions: ${error}
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.msg: 🧹 Completed Call Multiple UI Functions (Cleanup Phase)
kw.arg: 🧹 Completed Call Multiple UI Functions (Cleanup Phase)
kw.doc: Log informational message.
Executes all UI functional flows with exception handling and logging.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Open Login
kw.msg: 🌐 Opening URL: file:///C:/Users/vishakhajad/Desktop/ArgoTrak_Project/Agrotrak_Python_Robot_Project/templates/dummy_templates.html ℹ️ No login form found (dummy page). Skipping login.
kw.doc: Opens the given URL in a browser and performs login. Uses the SAME SeleniumLibrary instance that Robot Framework is using.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: ✅ Browser opened and login (if any) attempted
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Log Error
kw.arg: ❌ Exception caught during Run Multiple Environments: ${error}
kw.doc: Log error message.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Log Info
kw.doc: Log informational message.

test.doc: Loads configurations, executes full end-to-end AgroTrak + NewGate workflow.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: 🚜 AgroTrak – Full Automation Suite (With File Logging & Exception Handling)
